briefdescription.para: Address to copy RSA input parameters when the provided SyndromeAddr is 64-bit.
This function sets or clears Crypto bit mask of given NodeId.

parameterdescription.para: Operation to set or clear crypto bit mask

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If set or clear is successful
XST_FAILURE On failure

briefdescription.para: This function unwraps the input wrapped key and copies to secure shell.

parameterdescription.para: Lower address of the XSecure_KeyWrapData structure.
Higher address of the XSecure_KeyWrapData structure.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On Success
XSECURE_ERR_INVALID_KEY_STORE_ADDR If key store address is 0
XST_FAILURE On failure

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 SubsystemId, u32 RsaParamAddrLow, u32 RsaParamAddrHigh, u32 DstAddrLow, u32 DstAddrHigh)
memberdef.name: XSecure_RsaPrivateOperationIpi

briefdescription.para: This function handler calls XSecure_RsaInitialize and XSecure_RsaExp server API.

parameterdescription.para: Lower 32 bit address of the XSecure_RsaInParam structure
Higher 32 bit address of the XSecure_RsaInParam structure
Lower 32 bit address of the output data where decrypted data to be stored
Higher 32 bit address of the output data where decrypted data to be stored

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the Rsa decryption is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM If any input parameter is invalid
XSECURE_RSA_GEN_SIGN_FAILED_ERROR If RSA sign generation fails
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Validate internal address fields in the copied structure

briefdescription.para: This function calls respective IPI handler based on the API_ID.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the handler execution is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM If any input parameter is invalid
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
XST_SUCCESS - If the handler execution is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - If any input parameter is invalid
XST_FAILURE - If there is a failure

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the command structure.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the handler execution is successful.
XST_INVALID_PARAM If any input parameter is invalid.
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure.
XST_SUCCESS If the handler execution is successful.
XST_INVALID_PARAM If any input parameter is invalid.
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure.
Call the respective API handler according to API ID
XSecure_RsaDecrypt
Call the respective API handler according to API ID
XSecure_RsaDecrypt

briefdescription.para: This file contains the Xilsecure Versal Net IPI handlers implementation.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
5.1 kpt 01/13/2023 Initial release 5.2 vns 07/06/2023 Separated IPI commands of Update Crypto Status dd 10/11/2023 MISRA-C violation Rule 8.8 fixed dd 10/11/2023 MISRA-C violation Rule 8.13 fixed 5.3 kpt 12/13/2023 Added RSA quiet mode support kpt 01/19/2023 Fix passing public exponent ss 04/05/2024 Fixed doxygen warnings vss 04/25/2024 Use XPLMI_SECURE_RSA_PRIVATE_DEC_KAT_MASK instead of XPLMI_SECURE_RSA_KAT_MASK 5.4 yog 04/29/2024 Fixed doxygen grouping and doxygen warnings. kpt 05/26/2024 Add support for RSA CRT and RRN operation kpt 06/13/2024 Add support for RSA key generation. mb 07/31/2024 Added the check to validate Payload and command for NULL pointer mb 11/09/2024 Added Redundancy check for XPlmi_MemCpy64. 5.6 obs 07/25/2025 Added support for Verifying Address Range
